servinfo.title: Rear Brake Pad On-Vehicle Inspection
servinfo.ptxt: Inspect rear brake pad linings (1) periodically according to maintenance schedule and whenever wheels are removed (for tire rotation or other reason). Check lining thickness of outer and inner rear brake pads.
If lining is worn and its thickness (“a” in figure) is less than the limit, all rear brake pads must be replaced at the same time.
